basics.name: Prajjwal Nijhara
basics.label: PhD Student
basics.summary: M.Tech + Ph.D. student at IIT Jodhpur, TCS Research Scholarship Program Fellow, researching parallel and distributed computing with focus on dynamic graph algorithms.

work.name: Indian Institute of Technology Jodhpur
work.summary: Teaching assistant for undergraduate and graduate courses in the Department of Computer Science and Engineering.

work.name: Spiti
work.summary: Software development internship in Bengaluru, India.
